title: ageratina pochutlana
intro: Ageratina pochutlana, also known as Pochutla mountain mint, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Mexico. The medicinal properties of Ageratina pochutlana include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. This plant is used to alleviate various health issues, including digestive problems, headaches, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and relieving spasms. Ageratina pochutlana is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
